_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Quilt
author: support@phosphor.host
description: Quilt Server. Quilt is a lightweight mod loader for Minecraft based on Fabric Loader, with support for snapshots and fast updates to new versions.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Quilt Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y curl jq

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# The Quilt game endpoint DOES expose a "stable" flag, so we can filter on it.
LATEST_MC_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.quiltmc.org/v3/versions/game | jq -r 'map(select(.stable == true)) | first.version')
LATEST_MC_SNAPSHOT_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.quiltmc.org/v3/versions/game | jq -r '.[0].version')

# NOTE: Quilt's loader/installer entries do NOT carry a "stable" field
# (every loader is published as a "-beta.N" build), so filtering on
# `.stable == true` returns null. Take the newest entry (index 0) instead.
LATEST_LOADER_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.quiltmc.org/v3/versions/loader | jq -r '.[0].version')
LATEST_INSTALLER=$(curl -sSL https://meta.quiltmc.org/v3/versions/installer | jq -r '.[0]')
LATEST_INSTALLER_VERSION=$(echo "$LATEST_INSTALLER" | jq -r '.version')
LATEST_INSTALLER_URL=$(echo "$LATEST_INSTALLER" | jq -r '.url')

echo -e "Latest MC version is $LATEST_MC_VERSION"
echo -e "Latest MC snapshot is $LATEST_MC_SNAPSHOT_VERSION"
echo -e "Latest loader version is $LATEST_LOADER_VERSION"
echo -e "Latest installer version is $LATEST_INSTALLER_VERSION"

if [ -z "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" ] || [ "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
  MC_VERSION=$LATEST_MC_VERSION
elif [ "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" == "snapshot" ]; then
  MC_VERSION=$LATEST_MC_SNAPSHOT_VERSION
else
  MC_VERSION=$MINECRAFT_VERSION
fi

if [ -z "$QUILT_VERSION" ] || [ "$QUILT_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
  LOADER_VERSION=$LATEST_LOADER_VERSION
else
  LOADER_VERSION=$QUILT_VERSION
fi

if [ -z "$QUILT_INSTALLER_VERSION" ] || [ "$QUILT_INSTALLER_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
  INSTALLER_VERSION=$LATEST_INSTALLER_VERSION
  INSTALLER_URL=$LATEST_INSTALLER_URL
else
  INSTALLER_VERSION=$QUILT_INSTALLER_VERSION
  INSTALLER_URL="https://maven.quiltmc.org/repository/release/org/quiltmc/quilt-installer/${INSTALLER_VERSION}/quilt-installer-${INSTALLER_VERSION}.jar"
fi

echo -e "Installing Minecraft $MC_VERSION with Quilt loader $LOADER_VERSION (installer $INSTALLER_VERSION)"

# Unlike Fabric, the Quilt meta server does NOT provide a prebuilt
# /server/jar. We download the Quilt installer and run it to generate
# quilt-server-launch.jar plus the vanilla server.jar in /mnt/server.
echo -e "Downloading Quilt installer from $INSTALLER_URL"
curl -sSL -o quilt-installer.jar "$INSTALLER_URL"

# The installer's --install-dir value must be wrapped in literal quotes.
echo -e "running: java -jar quilt-installer.jar install server $MC_VERSION $LOADER_VERSION --install-dir=$(pwd) --download-server"
java -jar quilt-installer.jar install server "$MC_VERSION" "$LOADER_VERSION" --install-dir="\"$(pwd)\"" --download-server

rm -f quilt-installer.jar

if [ ! -f quilt-server-launch.jar ]; then
  echo -e "ERROR: quilt-server-launch.jar was not created. Check that Minecraft version '$MC_VERSION' and loader '$LOADER_VERSION' are valid."
  exit 1
fi

echo -e "Install Complete"

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description:
The version of Minecraft to download. 

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the .jar used to launch the Quilt server. The installer always produces quilt-server-launch.jar; the vanilla server it downloads is named server.jar.

variables.name: Quilt Version
variables.description: The version of Quilt to use

variables.name: Quilt Installer Version
variables.description: The version of the Quilt Installer to use. Leave at latest to always use the newest installer.
